pipelineInstructions.pattern: jobtype was fulltime but text strongly suggests gig
pipelineInstructions.instruction: jobType defaulted to FULLTIME but text signals otherwise. In inferJobTypeFromJsonLd() and the heuristic fallback, add keyword scan of title+description before defaulting. Examples: "FULLTIME", "FULLTIME"

pipelineInstructions.pattern: worktype was null, inferred from text
pipelineInstructions.instruction: workType was null but determinable from text. In inferWorkType() in enrichFromCsv.ts, expand keyword patterns to catch more signals — currently missing some phrases. Examples: "null", "null"

pipelineInstructions.pattern: jobtype was fulltime but text strongly suggests freelance
pipelineInstructions.instruction: jobType defaulted to FULLTIME but text signals otherwise. In inferJobTypeFromJsonLd() and the heuristic fallback, add keyword scan of title+description before defaulting. Examples: "FULLTIME", "FULLTIME"

pipelineInstructions.pattern: unformatted blob description (n chars, no formatting) — needs ai review
pipelineInstructions.instruction: [description] unformatted blob description (n chars, no formatting) — needs ai review occurred 14 time(s). Review extraction logic in enrichFromCsv.ts for this field.

pipelineInstructions.pattern: company name may be joined words: <value>
pipelineInstructions.instruction: Company name appears to be joined words with no spaces. Flag for AI review or attempt camelCase splitting in extractCompanyFromJsonLd(). Examples: "Masterclass", "Privateclubmarketing"

pipelineInstructions.pattern: location is just <value>, moving to worktype
pipelineInstructions.instruction: [location] location is just <value>, moving to worktype occurred 6 time(s). Review extraction logic in enrichFromCsv.ts for this field. Examples: "Remote", "Remote"

pipelineInstructions.pattern: jobtype was fulltime but text strongly suggests parttime
pipelineInstructions.instruction: jobType defaulted to FULLTIME but text signals otherwise. In inferJobTypeFromJsonLd() and the heuristic fallback, add keyword scan of title+description before defaulting. Examples: "FULLTIME", "FULLTIME"
Description is too short — likely wrong selector or page requires JS rendering. Consider expanding selectors or ensuring pageFetcher.ts waits for content to load.
